notes: EVENT STUDY REVIEWED. Soliman (2025) DEA crackdowns on pill mills. Staggered county-year panel. 3006 counties (95 treated, 8 cohorts 2007-2014, 2911 never-treated). Paper uses county + state*year FEs (additional_fes). Paper restricts TWFE to rel_year in [-3,3] (line 239 of Manuscript Code.R), dropping 247 treated-county obs far from treatment. Never-treated have rel_year=0 (always in window). Without filter: TWFE=-33.65 (6.76% gap). With filter: TWFE=-31.52 (exact match). CS segfaults on filtered sample (unbalanced panel: treated 4-7yrs, never-treated 9yrs triggers did pkg C code crash). STANDALONE SCRIPT required: investigate_241.R runs TWFE on filtered data, CS/SA/BJS on full data. Template cannot handle separate TWFE/CS samples. No controls in main spec. Outcome = MME per capita * 10. Table 1 Col 1. Replication code is R (not Stata). Original code: data/241/Files for Replication/Programs/AEJPol-2023-0640 Manuscript Code.R.
